description: Refactor all Layer 1 services to use Effect service pattern (Context.Tag + Layer). SourceDb, DashboardDb, IngestionService, StatsService. Currently services use raw bun:sqlite Database objects passed as function args. Need to wrap in Effect service machinery per coding-standard.md. Add typed error types (SourceDbError, DashboardDbError, IngestionError, StatsError) using Data.TaggedError.
title: Effect service layer: port services to Effect Context.Tag + Layer

description: Implement src/primitives/json.ts. safeParseJson(raw: string): Option.Option<unknown> - wraps JSON.parse in try/catch, returns Option.some on success, Option.none on failure. Never throws. Tests in test/primitives/json.test.ts: valid JSON, invalid JSON, empty string, nested objects, arrays, null literal.
title: primitives/json.ts: safeParseJson returning Option

description: Update src/ui/routes.ts to use template functions from ui/templates/. GET / calls StatsService.getOverview + getDailyStats(last 30 days) + DashboardDb sessions query, renders dashboard template. GET /sessions/:id fetches session detail + messages, renders sessionDetail template, returns 404 HTML if not found. Serve styles.css from file on disk. Wire into router.
title: ui/routes: wire GET / and GET /sessions/:id to real templates

description: Implement src/primitives/tokens.ts. sumTokens(records: readonly TokenRecord[]): TokenTotals - sums all token fields. avgTokensPerMessage(total: TokenTotals, count: number): TokenTotals - divides each field by count (guard against zero). Both pure, total functions. Tests in test/primitives/tokens.test.ts: multiple records, single record, empty array, zero values, division by zero.
title: primitives/tokens.ts: sumTokens, avgTokensPerMessage

description: Implement src/api/sessions.ts. GET /api/sessions: paginated list (page, limit query params validated via @effect/schema), returns {data: {sessions: SessionSummary[], total: number, page: number}}. GET /api/sessions/:id: session detail with messages array, returns {data: {session: SessionDetail, messages: MessageSummary[]}} or 404. Use Effect HttpRouter. JSON envelope per coding-standard. Tests in test/api/ (light, request/response shape).
title: api/sessions: GET /api/sessions and GET /api/sessions/:id

description: Implement src/primitives/stats.ts. sum(values: readonly number[]): number. avg(values: readonly number[]): number (returns 0 for empty). percentile(values: readonly number[], p: number): number. All pure, total, typed. Tests in test/primitives/stats.test.ts: normal arrays, empty arrays, single element, large numbers.
title: primitives/stats.ts: sum, avg, percentile helpers

description: Build the actual dashboard UI per spec. Currently ui/routes.ts returns a bare-bones HTML stub and styles.css has 5 lines. Need: (1) HTML template functions in ui/templates/ (page.ts, dashboard.ts, session-detail.ts), (2) proper styles.css with CSS custom properties (dark theme per spec: --color-bg:#0a0a0a, --color-text:#e0e0e0, --color-accent:#7c3aed), (3) dashboard page showing overview stats, daily chart, session list, (4) session detail page, (5) static file serving from src/ui/static/styles.css. No SPA framework, no build step.
title: UI: dashboard page with real data, CSS, templates

close_reason: Implemented DASHBOARD_DB_PATH and SYNC_INTERVAL_MS in getConfig with tests
description: Extend src/config.ts to include DASHBOARD_DB_PATH (optional, defaults to /data/dashboard.db) and SYNC_INTERVAL_MS (optional, defaults to 30000, must be positive integer). Fail fast if SYNC_INTERVAL_MS is set but not a valid positive integer. Update config.test.ts. This is needed before services can be wired in main.ts.
title: config: add DASHBOARD_DB_PATH, SYNC_INTERVAL_MS to getConfig

description: Refactor src/services/ingestion.ts to Effect service (IngestionService Context.Tag). ingestOnce: Effect<void, IngestionError>. Extend to ingest messages (extract role, providerID, modelID, cost, tokens from data JSON using safeParseJson + schemas), parts (step-finish for token data), compute session aggregates (message_count, total_cost, total_tokens_*, total_cache_*), upsert daily_stats. Add opencode_message cursor. Schedule periodic sync via SYNC_INTERVAL_MS config. IngestionError typed error. Integration tests in test/services/ingestion.test.ts.
title: services/ingestion: Effect service, messages+parts ingestion, aggregates

description: Implement all API routes from architecture.md that are missing: GET /api/sessions (paginated list), GET /api/sessions/:id (detail with messages), GET /api/stats/daily (date range, daily breakdown), GET /api/stats/models (per-model breakdown), GET /api/stats/projects (per-project breakdown). Existing: /api/health, /api/stats/overview (stub). All routes must use Effect HttpRouter, JSON envelope {data:...}/{error:...}, @effect/schema input validation on query/path params.
title: API: full routes per spec (sessions, stats/daily, stats/models, stats/projects)

description: Implement src/primitives/time.ts. formatDate(ms: number): string (YYYY-MM-DD). bucketByDay(ms: number): string (returns the date bucket). dateRangeDays(start: string, end: string): string[] (array of YYYY-MM-DD). All pure, no side effects. Tests in test/primitives/time.test.ts: various timestamps, epoch zero, future dates, timezone boundaries, same-day, multi-day ranges.
title: primitives/time.ts: formatDate, bucketByDay, dateRange

description: bd defaulted to port 3307 while the entrypoint-managed dolt server ran on 14164. Fixed by aligning both .beads/config.yaml (dolt.port) and .beads/dolt/config.yaml (listener.port) to the recommended port 13784, cleaning stale state files, and restarting the server.
title: Dolt server port mismatch prevents bd from connecting

description: Create src/services/stats.ts. StatsService Context.Tag with methods: getOverview(): Effect<Overview, StatsError> (totals, averages across all time), getDailyStats(range: DateRange): Effect<DailyStat[], StatsError>, getModelBreakdown(): Effect<ModelStat[], StatsError>, getProjectBreakdown(): Effect<ProjectStat[], StatsError>. Queries dashboard.db via DashboardDb. Uses primitives for math. StatsError typed error. StatsServiceLive + TestLayer. Integration tests in test/services/stats.test.ts with seeded data.
title: services/stats: StatsService Effect service with analytics queries

close_reason: Implemented all schemas: TokenRecord, AssistantMessageData, UserMessageData, MessageData union, PartData union, SessionSummary, DateRange. Tests in test/primitives/schemas/. Typecheck passes.
description: Create src/primitives/schemas/ directory with @effect/schema definitions. TokenRecord schema (input, output, reasoning, cache:{read,write}). AssistantMessageData schema (modelID, providerID, cost, tokens, finish?). UserMessageData schema (agent, model:{providerID,modelID}, system?, tools?). MessageData discriminated union on role. PartData discriminated union on type (text, tool, step-finish). SessionSummary type. DateRange type. All types exported. Tests in test/primitives/schemas/.
title: primitives/schemas/: TokenRecord, message data schemas

description: Create src/ui/templates/ directory with template functions. page(title, content): string - full HTML document with escapeHtml on title, links styles.css. dashboard(stats: Overview, daily: DailyStat[], sessions: SessionSummary[]): string - overview cards (total sessions, cost, tokens), daily breakdown list, sessions table with project/title/cost/tokens. sessionDetail(session: SessionDetail, messages: MessageSummary[]): string - session header, messages list. All HTML escaped, no XSS. No template engine dependency.
title: ui/templates: page.ts, dashboard.ts, session-detail.ts

close_reason: DashboardDb refactored to Effect Context.Tag + Layer. DashboardDbLive, DashboardDbTest, DashboardDbError added. messages + daily_stats tables in migrations. 45 tests passing.
description: Refactor src/services/dashboard-db.ts to Effect service pattern. DashboardDb class extends Context.Tag. Add messages and daily_stats tables to migrations (currently only sessions/ingestion_cursor exist). DashboardDbLive Layer (read-write, runs migrations on startup). DashboardDbTest Layer using :memory: SQLite. Add typed DashboardDbError. Integration tests in test/services/dashboard-db.test.ts verifying all table schemas, migration idempotency.
title: services/dashboard-db: Effect service + messages/daily_stats tables

description: Complete src/api/stats.ts. Add: GET /api/stats/daily (start/end query params, YYYY-MM-DD, validated), GET /api/stats/models (no params), GET /api/stats/projects (no params). Enhance existing GET /api/stats/overview to return real totals (total_cost, total_tokens_*, message_count) not just totalSessions. All use Effect HttpRouter, StatsService, JSON envelope. Tests in test/api/stats.test.ts.
title: api/stats: complete stats routes (daily, models, projects, overview)

description: Create Docker packaging per architecture.md spec. Dockerfile: FROM oven/bun:1-slim, WORKDIR /app, COPY package.json bun.lock, RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile --production, COPY src/, EXPOSE 3000, CMD [bun run src/main.ts]. docker-compose.yml: two volumes (devenv-data read-only for opencode.db, platform-404-data at /data for dashboard.db), env vars (OPENCODE_DB_PATH, DASHBOARD_DB_PATH, PORT, SYNC_INTERVAL_MS). Currently no Dockerfile or docker-compose exists.
title: Docker: Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, volume config

description: Refactor src/services/source-db.ts to Effect service pattern. SourceDb class extends Context.Tag. Interface: listSessionsUpdatedSince(sinceMs: number): Effect<SessionRow[], SourceDbError>, listProjectsByIds(ids: string[]): Effect<ProjectRow[], SourceDbError>, listMessagesForSessions(sessionIds: string[]): Effect<MessageRow[], SourceDbError>, listPartsForMessages(messageIds: string[]): Effect<PartRow[], SourceDbError>. SourceDbLive Layer using @effect/sql-sqlite-bun, readonly:true, PRAGMA query_only=ON. SourceDbError typed error. Integration tests in test/services/source-db.test.ts using a temp sqlite file.
title: services/source-db: Effect service wrapping read-only opencode.db

description: Implement src/ui/static/styles.css with full dark theme. CSS custom properties: --color-bg:#0a0a0a, --color-text:#e0e0e0, --color-accent:#7c3aed, --radius:6px, --gap:1rem. Semantic class names for dashboard layout: .stat-card, .sessions-table, .daily-list, .session-header, .messages-list. Mobile-first but desktop primary. No utility classes. Fix static file serving in ui/routes.ts to read from src/ui/static/styles.css file rather than inline string.
title: ui/static/styles.css: dark theme per spec

description: Create src/api/router.ts that composes all route fragments (health, stats, sessions, ui) using @effect/platform HttpRouter. Refactor src/main.ts to use @effect/platform-bun BunHttpServer, provide all layers (SourceDbLive, DashboardDbLive, IngestionServiceLive, StatsServiceLive), start periodic ingestion, fail fast on config errors. Remove the hand-rolled Bun.serve/URL switch.
title: api/router + main: wire Effect HttpRouter, compose all layers

description: Implement all Layer 0 primitives per spec: primitives/schemas/ (TokenRecord, AssistantMessageData, UserMessageData, SessionSummary, etc.), primitives/time.ts (formatDate, bucketByDay, date ranges), primitives/tokens.ts (sumTokens, avgTokensPerMessage, cost calculations), primitives/json.ts (safeParseJson), primitives/stats.ts (sum, avg, percentiles). Each with TDD unit tests under test/primitives/.
title: Primitives layer: schemas, time, tokens, json, stats

description: Extend ingestion to cover full data model from architecture.md. Currently only sessions (id, project_id, title, time_updated) are ingested. Missing: (1) message ingestion with role/provider/model/cost/tokens extracted from data JSON column, (2) part ingestion for step-finish token aggregation, (3) session aggregate columns (message_count, total_cost, total_tokens_*), (4) messages table in dashboard.db, (5) daily_stats table with precomputed aggregates, (6) opencode_message ingestion cursor.
title: Ingestion: messages, parts, token/cost data, daily_stats
